final:
module top_module(
	input wire [63:0]Data_A,
	input wire [63:0]Data_B,
	output reg [63:0]Result
);always @(*)
		begin
			Result <= Data_B + Data_A;
		end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (Result == Data_A) begin
        Result <= Data_B;
      end else begin
        Result <= Data_A;
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
